title: STE11639890 Regional Financial Controller (Media & Entertainment)
description:
The Company

Our client is a leading player in the media and entertainment industry, with a strong and growing presence across the Asia-Pacific region. They are seeking a Regional Financial Controller, APAC to partner the business during an exciting phase of growth and transformation.

The Role

Reporting directly to the APAC CFO, this is a high-impact regional role with broad exposure across commercial finance, controllership, and leadership of multi-country finance teams. Your responsibilities include:

• Lead all financial controllership activities across APAC, ensuring strong governance, compliance, and internal controls

• Oversee regional financial reporting, statutory accounts, audits, and tax compliance across multiple jurisdictions

• Partner closely with the APAC CFO and regional leadership on financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, and performance management

• Drive continuous improvement in financial processes, systems, and controls, supporting a fast-paced and evolving business

• Manage and develop regional finance teams, fostering a high-performance, collaborative culture

• Act as a key finance stakeholder for regional and global initiatives, including new market entry, restructuring, or transformation projects

Your Profile

As the successful candidate, you will possess a degree in Accountancy or ACCA with the following relevant experience:

• CPA/CA or equivalent qualification preferred

• At least 12 years of experience in finance and accounting within an MN environment, ideally within media, entertainment, technology, or consumer-driven industries

• Proven experience in handling a regional portfolio. International exposure and experience working across cultures within APAC will be a strong advantage.

• Strong background in financial controllership, consolidation, and multi-country reporting

• Proven ability to operate in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, with a hands-on and solutions-oriented mindset

• Nimble, agile, and adaptable, with the ability to manage ambiguity and change effectively

• Confident communicator with strong stakeholder management skills

Apply Today

Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number STE11639890, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

Robert Half International Pte Ltd.  Co. Registration no.: 200612189E | EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Serene Tan Ing Shiern EA Registration no.:  R1109248

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
